summary: Completed the final R0 Recovery Baseline systems Gate validation and recommend R0_GATE=PASS. The evidence confirms the RR0 task graph, current status, goal-mode, model-routing, thread registry, continuation, route files, worktrees, R0 audit matrix, roadmap authority, and forbidden-path scope are internally consistent. No R1 tasks or product changes were created.

decisions.decision: Recommend R0_GATE=PASS and route to independent qa_reviewer for review. Do not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED in this systems handoff.
No R1 task graph, agent spawn, product implementation, package/test/content/CI/dependency change, or PR was created.
The missing authoritative Web/Electron client runtime remains a documented R1 risk and does not invalidate R0 because R0 only establishes a trustworthy recovery baseline.

risks.summary: Normal Web/Electron paths still lack authoritative Worker command/query/save/load wiring. This must block R1 until implemented and tested, but it is not an R0 baseline blocker.
The protected M7 worktree still has 20 retained entries. It was verified but not modified.

requested_action: Independently review the R0 Gate evidence, task JSON, systems REVIEW handoff, scope proof, state consistency, and audit completeness. If accepted, route to Lead for status synchronization; if not, return exact REQUEST_CHANGES evidence to systems_architect.
